title: dev-stack: tooled local dev environment
stack_core: extracted gen_override.py (the shared port-offset/!override engine) from demo-stack; demo + dev consume it (settles M5 open question)
dev_stack: isolated dev stacks (dev-N, offset ports, -p dev-N guarded), real Clerk default, optional injection via stack-injection (--inject), reuses stack-core + stack-injection
verification: 87 tests green; shellcheck clean (dev-stack + repointed demo CLI); clerkenstein untouched -> deploy gate 100%/100% (7/7)

decisions.M6-D1: gen_override.py -> stack-core/ (shared); settles the M5-routed port-offset engine home
decisions.M6-D2: dev-stack scoped to proven value (shared engine + tooling + optional injection); not speculative multi-dev; full injected-dev reuses demo's flow
decisions.M6-D3: dev uses the platform compose directly, no per-stack clones by default (clone_repos stays in demo-stack)
